blocks.text: McIlroy and Young locked at Augusta — Masters Sunday showdown
Hovland sits T41 (+1) through the final round, Reitan T28 (-3) — neither in the hunt. This Masters is between McIlroy and Young, and it's going to the wire.
🎾 09:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters — Ruud enters as genuine clay-court title contender
